Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Pltfs' Fourth Cause Of Action For Breach Of Warranty Of Authority Based On Section 425.16 Of Ccp; Declaration Of D. Stanley Rowland; Declaration Of Lindbe
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Suzanne M. Mellard, Esq. of ROGERS, JOSEPH 956-2828, for defendants LINDBERGH PORTER, JR., STANLEY ROWLAND and ALLEN MATKINS LECK GAMBLE & MALLORY, LLP, moving for a special motion to strike plaintiffs' fourth cause of action for breach of warranty of authority
Andrew Scher, Esq., 781-4000, specially appearing for plaintiff's counsel Lerner & Veit, for plaintiffs and opposing the motion

RULING:
